exported_frontend = {'proc': CompletedProcess(args=['uv', 'run', 'reflex', 'export', '--frontend-only', '--no-zip'], returncode=0, stdout=...━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 100% 4/4 0:00:06\n', stderr=''), 'static_dir': PosixPath('/home/user/myproject/.web/_static')}

    def test_frontend_export_succeeds(exported_frontend):
        proc = exported_frontend["proc"]
        static_dir: Path = exported_frontend["static_dir"]
        assert proc.returncode == 0, (
            "`uv run reflex export --frontend-only --no-zip` failed with "
            f"exit code {proc.returncode}.\n"
            f"stdout:\n{proc.stdout}\nstderr:\n{proc.stderr}"
        )
>       assert static_dir.is_dir(), (
            f"Expected exported frontend assets under {static_dir} after "
            "`reflex export`."
        )

E       assert False
E        +  where False = <bound method Path.is_dir of PosixPath('/home/user/myproject/.web/_static')>()
E        +    where <bound method Path.is_dir of PosixPath('/home/user/myproject/.web/_static')> = PosixPath('/home/user/myproject/.web/_static').is_dir
